channel.title: News on Michael5Collins
channel.description: Recent content in News on Michael5Collins

item.title: Closing down Perthchat.org
item.description: As interesting as it has been we've found ourselves at a crossroad, the administrative and financial costs of continuing this service have risen. While the personal situations and priorities of the volunteers involved (particularly myself) have changed. Today we regretfully inform the public that the service is coming to an end.

item.title: ChatGPT comes to Perthchat!
item.description: Perthchat.org, a public Matrix service catering to Western Australians since 2017, has announced the integration of a ChatGPT bot, it uses a cutting-edge language model by OpenAI.

item.title: Why WA's Voluntary Assisted Dying Act Isn't Enough
item.description: Introduced in 2019 the Voluntary Assisted Dying Act allows patients who are already "acutely dying" to receive assistance in dying. You only qualify for it providing that you are...

item.title: Perthchat's New Android App
item.description: Today we’re proud to announce an expansion to Perthchat’s service, our new Android application!

item.title: Perth Vaccine Mandate Protest Sees Large Attendance
item.description: This Saturday's vaccine mandate protest saw over a thousand people attend, a considerably higher turnout than previous protests held elsewhere under lockdown conditions.

item.title: YouTube-DL Removed From GitHub After DCMA Notice
item.description: Friday night on the 23rd of October the ‘Recording Industry Association of America, Inc. (RIAA)’ sent a DMCA request to GitHub asking that the popular YouTube downloading software ‘youtube-dl’ be taken down.
